recommendations.title: The Cure
recommendations.overview: Erik, a loner, finds a friend in Dexter, an eleven-year-old boy with AIDS. They vow to find a cure for AIDS together and save Dexter's life in an eventful summer.

recommendations.title: Dexter's Laboratory: Ego Trip
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Action, Drama
recommendations.overview: After Dexter is confronted with robots who wish to "destroy the one who saved the future," he uses his time machine to see how he saved it. They declare that they are here to destroy the one who saved the future, and make ready to attack Dexter. Dext

recommendations.title: The Interview
recommendations.overview: A duel between a suspected murderer and a detective pressed by people who want results. But whose skin is really wanted?

recommendations.title: Little Fish
recommendations.overview: Set in the Little Saigon district outside of Sydney, a woman trying to escape her past becomes embroiled in a drug deal.

recommendations.title: One Day
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy centered on Dexter and Emma, who first meet during their graduation in 1988 and proceed to keep in touch regularly. The film follows what they do on July 15 annually, usually doing something together.

recommendations.title: The Oxford Murders
recommendations.overview: At Oxford University, a professor and a grad student work together to try and stop a potential series of murders seemingly linked by mathematical symbols.

recommendations.title: Black Coal, Thin Ice
recommendations.overview: Two former cops start investigating the series of murders that tanked their careers when the killings begin again.

recommendations.title: Pitch Perfect
recommendations.overview: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have

recommendations.title: The Limehouse Golem
recommendations.overview: A series of murders has shaken the community to the point where people believe that only a legendary creature from dark times – the mythical Golem – must be responsible.

recommendations.title: Why Don't You Just Die!
recommendations.overview: Andrey, a detective and the world's most horrible father, brings together a terrible group of people in his apartment: his resentful actress daughter, an angry thug, and a cheated cop. Each one of them has a reason to want revenge..
